text.title: aws-cfn-terraform-templates Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for aws-cfn-terraform-templates as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Setting DeletionPolicy to Delete on RDS instances in production stacks.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: A stack deletion or CloudFormation mistake permanently destroys the database and all data. Always use DeletionPolicy: Snapshot for RDS in non-ephemeral environments.

failure-mode.description: Hardcoding database passwords as CloudFormation parameters.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Parameters appear in CloudFormation events and stack history in plaintext. Use AWS::SecretsManager::Secret with GenerateSecretString and resolve via dynamic references.
